L1.area: User account management and data persistence layer

L2.description: An integer overflow or wraparound vulnerability exists because a text attribute has no length constraint. By supplying an excessively long string value, an attacker can trigger an integer overflow condition during processing, potentially leading to denial of service or other security impacts.

L3.area: User account management and data persistence layer
L3.description: An integer overflow or wraparound vulnerability exists because a text attribute has no length constraint. By supplying an excessively long string value, an attacker can trigger an integer overflow condition during processing, potentially leading to denial of service or other security impacts.

ground_truth.reason: The user model's name attribute is a text column with no length validation, allowing unlimited-length input that can cause integer overflow or wraparound when processed.
